description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short puffed sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your princess find her charming prince in style with this fairytale-inspired Princess and the Frog t-shirt from doodle. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts or skirts and sandals to complete her look.
